shortDescription: Read-only official Microsoft documentation, code samples, and product reference grounding via the Microsoft Learn MCP server.

capabilityGroups.shortDescription: Search official Microsoft docs and fetch full authoritative pages.
useWhen: you need authoritative Microsoft documentation before acting
you want factual grounding for Azure, Graph, M365, or .NET work

capabilityGroups.shortDescription: Find official Microsoft/Azure code samples and implementation references.
useWhen: you need runnable official samples for Microsoft technologies
you are implementing Azure, Graph, Foundry, or Microsoft 365 code paths

orchestratorUseCases: ground Azure and M365 operator actions in official Microsoft guidance
fetch authoritative documentation pages before taking platform actions
retrieve official Microsoft code samples for implementation tasks

tools.name: mslearn_docs_search
tools.description: Search official Microsoft documentation for relevant conceptual, operational, and reference guidance.
useWhen: you need a fast official Microsoft documentation overview before acting
avoidWhen: you need to mutate an external system rather than research it
tools.returnsSummaryShape: official Microsoft documentation search hits with URLs and excerpts

query.description: Query about Microsoft or Azure technologies.

tools.name: mslearn_docs_fetch
tools.description: Fetch a full Microsoft documentation page as markdown for deeper grounded reasoning.
useWhen: a search result found a promising Microsoft doc page and you need the full content
avoidWhen: you only need a broad search overview instead of a full page
typicalInputs: official docs URL from a prior search result
tools.returnsSummaryShape: full Microsoft documentation page in markdown form

url.description: The Microsoft documentation URL to fetch.

tools.name: mslearn_code_sample_search
tools.description: Search official Microsoft and Azure code samples and code-reference snippets.
useWhen: you need official Microsoft sample code or API usage patterns
avoidWhen: you only need conceptual documentation without sample code
tools.returnsSummaryShape: official Microsoft code sample hits with language-specific examples

query.description: The Microsoft or Azure coding topic to search for.
